infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: DRAE saves preparedness infographic PNGs to your photo library when you tap Download PNG.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: DRAE needs access to save preparedness infographic PNGs to your gallery.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: DRAE can attach your approximate GPS to hazard reports so responders can prioritize by distance. Location is optional and only sent when you submit a report.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow DRAE to save preparedness infographic PNGs to your gallery.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow DRAE to save PNG images to your photo library.
